name: google-workspace
description: Ingest Google Docs as revision-aware episodes

docs.summary: Ingests Google Docs as revision-aware episodes using the Drive and Docs APIs. Supports ADC and bearer token auth. Folder and query scopes enumerate docs automatically.
docs.auth_setup: Run `gcloud auth application-default login --scopes https://www.googleapis.com/auth/documents.readonly,https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly` to configure Application Default Credentials.

scope_examples.description: All docs owned by the authenticated user
